name: SAVE SAM THE LITTLE GREEN MAN

reviews.review_description: This is hands down one of the most intuitive and hilarious VR experiences I’ve ever had. I just got back into VR, and the hand tracking makes it feel even more immersive and satisfying. It’s instantly become a top favorite - an absolute blast to play!
If you like a fun arcade game, then this is for you. You have to use your hands to save sam. All levels are fun. And the leaderboard-system is very well made. You should try it !!
